query: SELECT content_fingerprint, ad_name, LENGTH(image_url) as img_len, LEFT(image_url, 120) as img_preview FROM ad_source_details WHERE LENGTH(image_url) > 200 ORDER BY img_len DESC LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3dMqJsm4KG1E8QU.03f2dd191437 --database UQDffrrvDgfhtLegk7yN6M --execute SELECT content_fingerprint, ad_name, LENGTH(image_url) as img_len, LEFT(image_url, 120) as img_preview FROM ad_source_details WHERE LENGTH(image_url) > 200 ORDER BY img_len DESC LIMIT 10;
